✨An art experience that’s more than just “Insta-worthy”!
Have you ever imagined art you can listen to, touch, or even take home? 🎧🖐🎁This September, we’re bringing something refreshingly different to KL Gateway Mall!

No boring galleries or serious lectures — Only fun, hands-on experiences you can truly enjoy!
👀 See bold and thoughtful works by young creatives
🛍  Find cute and creative merchandise from local artists
🪄 Join workshops and spark new ideas
💡 Visit our creative market filled with passionate people and original creations

This time, we invite YOU to explore, express, and discover something new ✨

📅 Event Dates : 06/09/2025 (Saturday) – 07/09/2025 (Sunday)
⏰ Event Time : 10AM – 8PM
📍 Event Venue : KL Gateway Mall, Jalan Kerinchi, Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, Malaysia

🌟Where there is light, there is a story.
Come and turn your passion into something that shines ✨
🔗 Get your tickets now: https://fleetinglight.art/ticket

For any inquiries, contact:
☎️ Calvin Ser Ying Hou: 014-9817101
☎️ Gillian Tiong Shaw Hui: 011-21861128

✨一场不止“打卡”的艺术体验！你有没有想过——艺术可以听、可以玩、可以带回家？🎧🖐🎁这个9月，我们在KL Gateway Mall搞点不一样的！

这里没有高高在上的艺术讲堂，只有可以感受、可以碰、可以笑的真实体验！
👀看见青春的躁动与思考
🛍遇见趣味周边和小巧玩意
🪄在工作坊里收获一份灵感火花
💡创意市集上，有灵魂又有趣的人和作品在等你！

这一次，
我们期待和你一起，发现更多可能 ✨

📅活动日期 ：06/09/2025（星期六）- 07/09/2025（星期日）
⏰活动时间 ：10AM - 8PM
📍活动地点 ：KL Gateway Mall, Jalan Kerinchi, Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, Malaysia

有光的地方，就有故事。
我们等你来，把热爱变成一道灵感的光 ✨
🔗立即购票：https://fleetinglight.art/ticket

如有任何疑问，请联络：
☎️徐英皓 014-9817101
☎️张守蕙 011-21861128

The ‘Rumah Kosong’ theatre is one of the highlights of Apresiasi A. Samad Said 2025 program. ⭐️

Organised by @pertubuhan_seninusantara together with @creativemmu, @mmumalaysia, Crisscut Design and @manggis.group, this program aims to honour the works and legacy of National Laureate Dato’ Sri (Dr.) A. Samad Said through digital, interactive, and contemporary approaches. 

🗓️15-17 May 2025
📍FCM Gallery, Faculty of Creative Multimedia, Multimedia University, Cyberjaya.

Any enquiries please contact:
Bhuvanesh Rao (Director)
016-2587025

#CMC #mmucyberjayacampus #mmucyber #fcmmmu

Don’t know what to submit for the logo competition? 🤕

Here’s a tip for you 😎

1. Primary logo is the main graphic that represents your brand and is used the most

2. Secondary logo is a simpler version of the primary logo that is used to fit it other formats and sizes

3. Submark is a stripped down version of the primary logo and is used for places that both primary and secondary can’t. (Keyword : icon/mark)

Don’t forget to submit your logo rationale too!!! 🤩
#unleashcreativity
#logocomeptition
#mmu
#cmc
